stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
The probe shown is a (1) _____, it (2) _____ to prevent it becoming (3) _____ resulting in false indications which could lead to (4) _____.

options.a: (1) AoA vane, (2) is heated, (3) stuck, (4) undesirable aircraft attitudes or states.
options.b: (1) AoA vane, (2) isn't heated, (3) stuck, (4) undesirable aircraft attitudes or states.
options.c: (1) Pitot probe, (2) is heated, (3) blocked, (4) unreliable airspeed indications.
options.d: (1) AoA vane, (2) is heated, (3) too sensitive, (4) incorrect airspeed indications.
